observations.summary: The scene contrasts the faint, fragile light of the torch wick with the overwhelming encroaching darkness, highlighting a tension between illumination and obscurity.

left_evidence.quote: Dan pinched the torch wick between thumb and forefinger.

bridge_evidence.quote: He held his bearings by memory and the single slot of moonlight through the narrow wall slit, barely a handspan wide, that cut a gray line across the corridor floor.
